• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 5 selectable response personality styles
  • Generates AI answers via OpenRouter API with a free Gemma model
  • Includes 3D particle effects, shake animations, and responsive design
    const MODEL = "google/gemma-3n-e2b-it:free";
    magicBall.classList.add('is-shaking');

This web app simulates a Magic 8 Ball with AI-generated dynamic responses. Users choose from five personality tones and input questions to get answers. It features 3D particle visuals, interactive animations, and responsive styling.
